note: Tinker is the model fine-tuning/training API from Thinking Machines Lab (thinkingmachines.ai/tinker). This dataset is populated automatically by tools/refresh.js from public Hacker News and GitHub mentions. Because 'Tinker' is a very common word, matching is restricted to the product's own identifiers (thinkingmachines.ai, the thinking-machines-lab GitHub org, the tinker-cookbook repo, and the phrase 'Tinker API'). Auto-collected items are unverified keyword-heuristic guesses.
